data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for bounce handling and re-delivery.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Bounce handling and re-delivery', but the provided evidence does not include any references or checks related to this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for bounce handling and re-delivery, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm or deny this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of evidence.
gaps: No evidence of bounce handling and re-delivery functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for bounce handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the bounce handling and re-delivery requirement.
